title: Bow Upgrade
description: This mod lets you craft a Netherite Bow and more!
body:
# 🏹 Bow Upgrade

**Netherite tools, swords, armor — but what about bows?**

## ✨ Main Features
* **🟩 Emerald Bow** — brings wealth to its owner! When killing mobs with this bow, there is a chance they will drop an emerald.

> Other than that, each new bow in the mod differs in attack power and arrow range, offering a fair and satisfying progression.

---

## 📸 Recipes
## *Emerald Bow*

> You can get it from the Fletcher villager with a certain chance if you level him up to the maximum level.

![Emerald Bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/934c32ecd185cede43c6f6d179aeebeeba0d429e.png)

> *Netherite Bow*

![Netherite Bow Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a54b139dbe543a66a138526be120c49902aa5ad9.png)

## *Diamond Bow*

> To craft a diamond bow, you need to obtain a diamond scrap, which has a 35% chance of dropping from diamond ore

![Diamond Bow Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b546b77cfe4faff69b867c75fb4f1a0f5fabd75.png)

## *Iron Bow*

![Iron Bow  Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a02070f983381b5f80a89d75dcbf5b8eb967689e.png)

## *Golden Bow*

![Golden Bow Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ded2a330672cc845ed826ead4a0e51ffd2c9fa1.png)

## *Copper Bow*

![Copper Bow Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16d331cc428798464c4026868a77f05917b5656b.png)

---

## ⚙️ Installation & Dependencies
* **Platform:** Fabric (port to NeoForge is planned)
* **Dependencies:** **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** is required for the mod to work.
* **Translations available: EN, RU**
